v1.1.0 — Auto-scale, waterway rendering, booklet layout

Features:
- Auto-scale: pixels_per_yard derived per-hole from lat/lon geometry at render time;
  manual "Set Scale" two-point calibration removed from tagger entirely
- Waterway linestring support: streams, rivers, ditches, canals render as open stroked
  lines instead of closed filled polygons; new "waterway" type distinct from "water"
- Tagger UX: water/waterway/path features auto-injected as course-wide (non-taggable,
  no filter chips, non-interactive); OSM tile layer greyscaled; "other" label removed
- Booklet assembly reordered to 1/chart+18/cover, 3/2+16/17, 5/4+14/15, 7/6+12/13, 9/8+10/11

Fixes:
- OSM classification hardened: boundary/place excluded; waterway pre-checked before
  exclude gate so bridged/culverted streams survive
- Yardage arc radii now self-consistent with fit_hole() scaling (ppy × scale_factor
  cancellation fixed)
- Cover page no longer crashes with "name 'projected' is not defined"
- Green centroid unified to Shapely across TUI and PDF render paths

Technical:
- Repo renamed to pinsheet-cartographer; README badges, URLs updated
